orderMode.description: The order in which messages are broadcast. Options: SEQUENTIAL, RANDOM

globalEnable.description: Enable or disable global announcements in chat.

headerAndFooter.description: Enable or disable the header and footer around global chat announcements.

globalInterval.description: The interval in seconds between each global chat announcement.

prefix.description: Prefix prepended to all announcement messages. Use {prefix} placeholder in messages to apply.

header.description: The header message sent before a global announcement. Supports colors, gradients, bold, etc.

footer.description: The footer message sent after a global announcement. Supports colors, gradients, bold, etc.

sound.description: Sound to play for players when an announcement is made. E.g., 'minecraft:block.note_block.pling'. Leave empty for no sound.

globalMessages.description: List of messages to be broadcast in global chat. Supports colors, gradients, bold, italic, underline, etc.
value: <bold><gradient:#3A86FF:#FB5607>[Paradigm]</gradient></bold> <color:#F8FAFC>Tip:</color> <gradient:#F472B6:#FF006E>Use a group chat</gradient><color:#94A3B8> with </color><click:suggest_command:/groupchat><gradient:#22D3EE:#3A86FF><bold><underline>/groupchat</underline></bold></gradient></click><color:#94A3B8> to keep things organized.</color>

actionbarEnable.description: Enable or disable announcements shown on the action bar.

actionbarInterval.description: The interval in seconds between each action bar announcement.

actionbarMessages.description: List of messages to be broadcast on the action bar. Supports colors, gradients, bold, italic, etc.

titleEnable.description: Enable or disable announcements shown as a screen title.

titleInterval.description: The interval in seconds between each title announcement.

titleMessages.description: List of messages to be broadcast as a title. Separate title and subtitle with ' || '. Supports colors, gradients, bold, italic, etc.

bossbarEnable.description: Enable or disable announcements shown as a temporary boss bar.

bossbarInterval.description: The interval in seconds between each boss bar announcement.

bossbarColor.description: Color of the boss bar. Options: BLUE, GREEN, PINK, PURPLE, RED, WHITE, YELLOW.

bossbarTime.description: How long the boss bar should remain on screen, in seconds.

bossbarMessages.description: List of messages to be broadcast in a boss bar. Note: bossbars do not support click/hover actions. Supports colors, gradients, bold, italic, etc.
